India.title: Braving rain, thousands re-group at CJP protest site at Jantar Mantar
India.summary: From only about 200-300 people early in the morning, crowd swells to thousands by evening; many first-timers say ‘brutal’ police action made them join the protest site

India.title: SIT formed to look into allegations against Art of Living, says Karnataka Deputy Chief Minister
India.summary: The Karnataka government has constituted a 11-member Special Investigation Team led by Bengaluru Regional Commissioner Amlan Aditya Biswas to probe the alleged grabbing of government land by the Art of Living ashram and its affiliate organisations on the outskirts of Bengaluru

India.title: Congress takes out Lok Bhavan march in Thiruvananthapuram
India.summary: The police bid to round up some protesters leads to heated exchanges. The protesters shout slogans against the police and in support of the Youth Congress

India.title: SC sets aside death sentence in 1996 Rajasthan bus blast case, orders fresh trial
India.summary: The proceedings stand vitiated by the denial of effective legal representation and other procedural lapses that undermined the constitutional guarantee of a fair trial, the apex court says

India.title: Dubai-based IT manager alleges humiliating Customs search at Kannur airport, seeks CM’s intervention
Union Education Minister Pradhan says Rahul, Congress exploiting students; CJP's Jantar Mantar protest site draws Opposition leaders | LIVE
India.summary: Govt wasted our time, says Dipke on talks between Nadda, CJP team; Sonam Wangchuk shifted to Medanta Hospital

India.title: 'We owe students more than outrage': Education minister Pradhan slams Cong protest
India.summary: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan accused Rahul Gandhi and Congress of exploiting students politically. He stated they staged a protest outside the Prime Minister's residence, causing public inconvenience. The minister added that Congress chose spectacle over…

India.title: Pellet guns, shock batons used against protesters in Delhi; police deny
India.summary: Shaikh Irshad Mansoori suffered pellet injuries, the first known case of security forces using pellet guns in Delhi; police deny use, say public must “verify facts”

India.title: India's growth remains strong, but trade barriers threaten 2047 goal: WTO
India.summary: India's strong economic growth continues, but structural reforms are needed for developed nation status. High trade costs and regulatory complexity present significant challenges to global integration. The World Trade Organization report notes progress in trade facilitation and…

India.title: Rahul Gandhi, Congress MPs detained after taking paper leak protest to the PM’s doorstep
India.summary: Congress MPs march 100 metres from Congress chief’s house to the PM’s residence, raising four demands; forcibly cleared by Delhi police after three hours; “beginning of the end” for Modi regime, says Congress leader

Nepal.title: How Sonam Wangchuk became the face of India’s Gen Z protest movement
Nepal.summary: The education reformer and environmental activist has emerged as the unlikely leader of a youth movement challenging Narendra Modi's government over examination paper leaks, with his hunger strike drawing nationwide support.

Nepal.title: Cervical cancer screening in Kathmandu finds 90 women positive for HPV
Nepal.summary: While the HPV vaccine included in the routine immunisation list targets types 16 and 18, recent screening shows infections with multiple HPV types, including those not covered by the vaccine.

Nepal.title: Justice remains elusive for Saptari couple caught in usury trap
Nepal.summary: An elderly couple say they repaid nearly Rs1.6 million on loans worth Rs480,000, but their mortgaged land remains out of reach.

Nepal.title: Andy Burnham to become prime minister, pledging to ‘rewire Britain’
Nepal.summary: Burnham will use his first speech to set ​out a path for “a more stable and responsible politics”, his office said in a statement.

Nepal.title: Nepal’s fastest man had to do it without Nepal
Nepal.summary: Between day-job spreadsheets and borrowed tracks, self-coached sprinter Aayush Kunwar quietly rewrote Nepal’s athletic history.

Nepal.title: PM Shah to break self-imposed rule with separate meetings with Indian, Chinese envoys
Nepal.summary: The prime minister will separately meet Srivastava and Zhang this week after the government completed its first 100 days.

Nepal.title: Chief Minister Shah weighs confidence vote as Sudurpashchim sinks deeper into budget crisis
Nepal.summary: Reduced to a minority after the UML withdrew support, the chief minister is banking on talks in Kathmandu as the province remains trapped in a fiscal vacuum.

Nepal.title: Hamas names Khalil Al-Hayya as new leader, statement says
Nepal.summary: Al-Hayya ​was among top officials targeted in an Israeli attack in Doha ​in 2025, ​Israeli officials told Reuters.

Nepal.title: Government suspends new recruitment in civil service for current fiscal year
Nepal.summary: Blanket freeze on permanent appointments leaves hundreds of thousands of public service aspirants facing uncertainty.

Nepal.title: India’s ‘cockroach movement’ leaders say minister promises talks on demands
Nepal.summary: Thousands of young supporters gathered through the night at the protest site of Jantar Mantar in New Delhi for the march on the opening day of parliament’s monsoon session.
